results.title: Incarcerated People Lose Treasured Media When Prisons Change Tablet Contracts
results.description: People are losing purchased music and games, as well as emails and photographs from loved ones, without compensation.

results.title: Claude Fable returns, Meta AI is reading minds and Sam Altman bets on gadgets – Weekly AI roundup
results.description: Our weekly AI roundup detailing major breakthroughs and corporate shifts, including the re-release of Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5, Meta's mind-reading AI and "Pocket" app, OpenAI's new physical developer macro pad, OpenClaw's mobile launch, and multi-billion-dollar corporate AI contracts in India.
